title: Orbital Defense Cannon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:NodKarthaFirepower.png|250px|thumb|Three Orbital Defense Cannons in orbit above [[Nod Kartha]]]]

The '''Orbital Defense Cannon''', also known as the '''Planetary Defense Gun''', '''Defense Cannon''', '''Orbital Gun''', '''Orbital Cannon''', and '''Planetary Cannon''', was a type of [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that was armed with a very powerful anti-ship cannon. Its role of defense was against enemy starships. The cannon was powerful enough to damage a [[Mere cruiser]] significantly. If placed on a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] correctly, it could be used for an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]].

==Description==
The cannon consisted of four primary components: a [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]], a capacitor, a focus array and a casing. With all four of these, it was possible to salvage and rebuild a cannon if it was destroyed.

==History==
[[File:OrbitalDefenseCannon-JSF.jpg|250px|thumb|An Orbital Defense Cannon on [[Khons]]]]
The Orbital Defense Cannon was used in the [[Battle of Nod Kartha]], where one of the cannon's projectiles severely damaged the Mere cruiser ''[[Kethor]]''. Despite the firepower, the [[Mere Resistance]] and the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]], led by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] and with the help of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], managed to punch a hole in Nod Kartha's defense. Afterwards the pirates decided to do a salvage run and found enough components to rebuild one of them. However the [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]] under the command of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]] in the [[Sabaoth destroyer|Sabaoth Destroyer]] [[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|''Reaver'']] also had the same idea. Despite her best efforts the Lok Revenants got the components onto the ''[[Tritus]]''. They then got the cannon set up on one of Lok's moons known as [[Khons]].

The cannon was then used in the [[Battle of Lok (22 BBY)|Second Battle of Lok]], which [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] used to take back [[Nym's Base|his base]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
